topic: Lisa Cook CP meta-prediction key facts
summary: SCOTUS oral argument on Lisa Cook removal scheduled Jan 21, 2026 - AFTER the Jan 15 measurement date. CP at 11.00% as of Jan 3. 102 forecasters. Manifold market at 6.5% for Cook leaving.
content:
Key facts for meta-prediction question:
- CP on underlying question: 11.00% as of Jan 3
- Threshold: strictly above 11.00%
- Measurement date: Jan 15, 2026
- SCOTUS oral arguments: Jan 21, 2026 (6 days AFTER measurement)
- 102 forecasters on underlying question
- Manifold market: ~6.5% for Cook leaving (lower than Metaculus)
- All lower courts ruled for Cook
- SCOTUS allowed Cook to stay pending argument
- No Fed governor has ever been removed in 112 years of history
- Trump fired Cook in Aug 2025, federal judge blocked in Sep 2025, DC Circuit upheld block, SCOTUS took case Oct 2025
